name: pi-pr-agents
description_en: Graphite/PR-stack orchestration for pi: a main agent that splits work into PRs, dispatches a dedicated worktree subagent per PR, and lays them out as labelled tmux panes.
description_zh: pi 的 Graphite/PR-stack 编排：一个主代理，将工作拆分为 PR，为每个 PR 分发专用工作区子代理，并将它们布置为标记的 tmux 窗格
